examples: Now I ask you, how do you intend to legitimise that?
It's your intention to legitimise professional football?
Rosneft wants its 5% stake in BP because it helps to legitimise the break-up of Yukos.
Zia ul Haq, his successor, tried to legitimise his military coup by pledging to Islamise the country.
Whether there will be enough to legitimise the assembly in the eyes of their brethren remains to be seen.
